titlestmt.titleproper: Early Regional History Collection accessions files13-6-3871
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-10-10 23:01:10 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Early Regional History Collection accessions files

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Library. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Early accessions files, with some accompanying single item or very small collections.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Collection of Regional History was one of the predecessor units of the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Early accessions files, with some accompanying single item or very small collections.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Early Regional History Collection accessions files, #13-6-3871. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

unittitle.extref: Link to the finding aid. PDF file.

did.unittitle: Memorial sermon to Harriet Stevens Randall
Account of the terrific and fatal riot at the New York Astor Place Opera House (pamphlet)
Transportation papers, also photostats on flour milling
First reformed Protestant Dutch Church, Schenectady, NY, Union College Centennial [pamphlet/leaflet]
4 letters: William Seward, Horatio Seymour, George L. Marcy, Robert H. Morris
Autographs: 161m. F. H. Seward ALS, Lewis Tappan ALS
Reminiscences of the Revolution or La Loup's Bloody Trail, Arthur Reid [pamphlet?]
Bankruptcy decree, annual report of state engineer
Minutes of the Alpine E. A. U., accounts, letter
Autograph: A.D. Blodgett, Randall mansion picture (picture collection?)
Hudson River guide [Map Coll. #460], picture card of locomotive "Best Friend" and "DeWitt Clinton" [RHP #- 963P]
Autographs: Wm. H. Seward, S. J. Tilden
Autographs: Andrew D. White, Rufus King, J. c. Spencer, Ethan B. Allen
Account books, miscellaneous, pamphlets ACCESSION FLD PULLED FOR ACCESSIONING
Map: Central New York Southern Railroad [Map ColI. #158]
Map: School District No.4, Alexandria, NY
"Influence of Dress in the Production of Disease in Females," Dr William D. Purple
Pictures of Ithaca and Vicinity [transferred to stereoscopic slide and RHP collections]
Autographs: John A. Dix, W. 1. Marcy, Francis E. Spinner [transferred to #167]; and claim
Wholesale catalogue of the Mount Hope Nurseries, Rochester [distributed?]
"First white man that owned the town of Sangerfield," W. H. Weller [Coll. #100- item #317]
"Discipline of the Religious Society of Friends of Ohio Yearly Meeting, Mount Pleasant, 1859" [CoIL #4OO-item #68]

Kingsley's Grain, Milling and Feed, Hay and Straw, Fruit , I and Produce, Marging, Brewing, Distilling, Butter, Eggs and Poultry Directory of the United States, 1891 (Ref. Shelf); NY Almanac, 1888 [Coll. #200]; Sterling Stoves and Ranges catalog [Coll. #l00-item 318)
Memorials of the Rev. John Cantine Farrel Hoes D.D.
17 photostats, one pamphlet on Nassau County
Autographs: A. S. Aintoy, DeWitt Clinton, Silas Wilmot, John Bliss
Autographs: Walter Failing, Mary Jane Failing

Photostat copy of inscription on fly leaf of copy of Jefferson's "Notes on Virginia," 1782; picture of Complanter, 1836; card and scrap album of George S. Brooks containing colored advertisements, war and political cartoons, valentine, etc.; historical society and other pamphlets
Pierce's Memorandum and Account Book, 1903-1910 (3 copies) [in pamphlet file]
2 mss.: People vs. Stephen Ostrander and Bert Casterline; People vs. Sadie M. Smith
Brooks gift: photograph of Honor Roll of Groton, NY; text concerning WWI and II, by George S. Brooks [broadside coll. -item #289]
Town of Enfield local election slates [broadside coll. Item #5009
Misc. deeds, indentures, letters, bonds, invitations, agreements, receipts, broadsides [broadside collection-items #290-326], pamphlets [Coll. #600 - 55-58, #100 - 519-524]
History of the Old Fairfield Seminary, by Silas C. Kimm (Evening Times, Little Falls, NY) 8 installments
Gem and Casket, school magazine [Bd. Ms.]
French ColI: regional miscellany, some pamphlets
Chew family: Photostats re Nassau Co.
Misc. items: 2 scrapbooks, program of Hudson-Fulton Celebration, 1909
Kingsley Coll.: Misc., trade cards, broadsides, maps ACCESSION FLD PULLED FOR ACCESSIONING ONLINE
lloyd Allen Coll.: misc. v., broadsides [broadsides coll.], correspondence, bills, receipts, verses
12 pix of Adirondacks, 8 pix of homes in Fairfield, CT [in picture coll.]
Greater States of Continental Europe: history lecture by A. D. White, 1874
Photostats of Virginia House of Delegates and Virginia Slave Papers
"Univercoelum and Spiritual Philosopher, ""Rochester Gem and Ladies Amulet"[distributed]
Samuel Colgate Baptist Historical Collection items: miscellaneous newspapers [some distributed to pamphlet coll.]
Newspaper clippings, bills [pamphlets in pamphlet coll.]
Misc. invitations, teaching certificate, menus, Cornelliana, pamphlet, bulletin
Letters, program, clipping, sermon, paper currency
Broadside, thesis, account book and inventory [in mss. file] book of recipes, book of legal entries and general account book [on v. shelf]
Misc. items of Ithaca and vicinity, pamphlets, news clipping, photographs
"New Clerk's Assistant," by John S. Jenkins; 2 Legislative manuals [distributed], maps [map coll.]
"On the meanings of the concept conveyed by the words 'Scientific Law,''' by Philip Wm. Hausmann (ms.)
Misc.: bill of sale, license for tavern, picture of steamer, passport
Frankie in Wonderland: parody on Roosevelt [pamphlet]
4 broadsides advertising programs of Troy Museum [broadside coll. See social life]
Citizens union of the city of New York broadsides and publications
Pamphlet, paper on algebra, paper on color-blindness
Autographs: letters from C. A. and F. C. Seward to Major General Segoine
Gazetteer and business directory of St. Lawrence Co., 1873- 4, Hamilton Child's copy
"Abandoned railroad rights of way in New York State," listed by Waldo J. Nielsen [ms.]
"History of the Grange," and "Rise of the Granger Movement," by J. Wallace Darrow-No donor [pamphlet]
Dedication exercises ... at the Witter Agricultural Museum (1929), State Fair Grounds [program/pamphlet]
Misc.: report on U.S. vs. Wm. S. Hubbel

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 575m. - history of Presbytery of Bath, by B. C. Smith; list of wardens and vestryment, St. Thomas Ch., Bath; "A Local Sketch - Fifty Years Ago," by George W. Pratt [typed ms.]; legal papers; 2 corporation items [distributed to business library]; broadside for King Bros. Circus; 12 comic valentines; 1 photo of "Diedrich Hudson" (lake steamer) [RHPC]; "A While Back" [pamphlet coll.)

did.unittitle: Autograph: Ezra Cornell; 56 slides [stereoscopic slide coll.]
Confederate flag; 100 shares stock in NY & Westchester Railroad Co.; bill from White Bros. dealers in hardware, house-furnishing goods, etc.
Legal documents: mortgage, brief; clippings, Song of the Fugitive Slave, autographs (letters): Theodore Roosevelt, others
Photos: campus, Cayuga Inlet [general picture coll. #981]
Cotton & Hanlon catalogs; 5 photos of Class of 1893 [tr. To #41/4/M]
Delaware County, Echoes of the Past in. [pamphlet/book]
Lithograph of Cornell Public Library [picture coIl. #697- 959P]
Church leaflets, programs, prayer meeting topics, for Baptist, Methodist, Episcopal, and Presbyterian churches of Prattsburgh, and Christian Ch. of Ingleside, misc. leaflets
"Early history of Jay Township, 150 years of changes," by Fred A. Torrance [typescript]
Maria Hanford Upton, MD. Memorial publication [pamphlet]
Items re Olive Branch Lodge of Westtown, Orange Co. and Mapes family genealogy, Suffolk Co.
Documents from records of Office of Indian Affairs, Dept. of Interior re Buffalo Creek and Tonawanda Indian Reservation [photostats]
"A Country Banker Turns Fifty," by Neil H. Dorrance [article] development of country bank and history of Dorrance family, Madison and Oneida Cos.
Glen Springs and Watkins Glen, N.Y. [booklet/pamphlet]
Photo: Theodore Roosevelt, Assemblyman O'Neil, Assemblyman Isaac L. Hunt, Assemblyman Walter Howe, George Spinney of NY Times, 1883
"Cascadilla Place ... " address by Miss S. S. Nivison
Park Church (Elmira, NY) pew rent receipt, 1903
"Hist. of Syracuse & Onondaga Co.," Wm. M. Beauchamp
Inventory of tug boats, NYC, L.I. Sound, Hudson River, and NYS Barge Canal 1943
Poem on Mr. Jesse Smith and Wife [broadside colI. #1469]
Buffalo and Susquehanna Railroad corp. income account statements and Western Union Telegraph annual report
"An Unwritten Medical Classic," re role of John J. Moran as volunteer subject for Dr. Walter Reed's yellow fever experiments; title and author indices to 26v. literary Clinic papers
"Community of True Inspiration," review for centennial of background of Ebenezer Community, West Seneca, Erie Co.
4 v. American Agriculturist, 1860-1863; 7 v. Country Gentleman, 1859-1863
Cohoes Dutch Reformed Church semi-centennial program, 1887
13 Photos of points of interest in NYS [RHPC #435P-445P]
"Fifty Years Ago," by George W. Pratt (typescript) [see #657]
Declaration of Tights, 1775; New York Provincial Congress
William E. Evans certificate [o/s drawer A-14 (Olin)]
American Monthly Magazine, 1813; Central New York Farmer, 1842
Dr. Joel Gilbert Justin and Dr. Helen De Witt Justin: biographical sketches, by Joel D. Justin
Facsimile of preliminary draft of first comptroller's first annual report, 1/10/1797-1/8/1798
"Historical Review of the Town of Lysander," by L. Pearl Palmer
Covert and Romulus (Seneca Co.) maps, 1856 (neg. photostats), maps 1859 (pos. photostats) [map 636]

Autographs: patent (Martin Van Buren's signature appears to have been written by a copyist.), notice signed by George W. Pullman; Charles E. Hughes, Henry G. Danforth, Herbert H. Lehman, Lewis E. Lawes
Cornell registration card, 1881 (not in file); Ithaca concert ticket, 1881
"Builders of Keuka College," but Z. F. Griffin; programs, St. Thomas' Church, Soldiers and Sailors Home, Bath, NY; Lincoln centenary [pamphlet]; campaign buttons, NYS Grange and misc. buttons
"Life of George Washington," M. L. Weems
Freight Rates: Memorandum for the Delaware and Hudson Co., [pamphlet]
Lucky Boy Consolidated Mine Co. (Silver Mining) items
"History of a Community," by N. A. Funicello, Cherry Creek, NY [typescript ms.]
Franklin Academy and Prattsburgh High School announcement,1906-1907
"When Fulton built a bridge" newspaper clipping
"Porter's Spirit of the Times" [sent to main library]
"Niagara-Mohawk: the People and the Land it Serves"
Rochester Free Academy - course of study - 1875 [catalog]
Outline preface to Rush - from Prehistoric Time to 1924 [typescript ms.]
"Fifty Years of New York Steam Service" (Consolidated Gas Co. of NY)
13 children's books, 1814-1836; 3 western almanacs, 1836, 1860, 1862; 2 indentures, 1817, 1824; 3 New Berlin Academy broadsides, 1845-1846, 1866; 6 valentine poems, 1 Deist brochure

NYS farm (7) census, 1931: Jefferson, Westchester, Franklin, Schuyler, Suffolk, Sullivan, Wyoming, Tompkins, Schoharie, Madison, Lewis, Monroe, Kings, Genesee, Seneca, Hamilton, Greene, Oswego, Otsego, Washington, Nassau, Oneida, Wayne, Warren, Ulster, Putnam, Niagara, Montgomery, Herkimer, Steuben, Yates, Tioga, Fulton, Delaware Counties
Uncle Sam Wilson mural, Pony Express map

Clippings re General Sullivan; souvenir programs of Pan American Exposition, 1901; program of Whitman-Spalding Centennial, 1936; program of 14th anniversary of Cortland, NY YMCA; and book reviews of 3 new Indian books, 1915
NYS history items [all transferred to other collections]
City Island trolley car photo and negative RHPC 1008P
Rochester, 1889 [map]; Half Century Sermon, 1st Presbyterian Church, Ithaca, 1866 [pamphlet]; Tompkins Co. Bd. of Supervisors report, 1864 (2 c.) [pamphlets]
Utica in the Past, Beginnings in Utica [typed mss.]
July 4, 1910 program, WWI memorial service program, Cuba Baptist Church, 1918
Free list, names in alpha order, 1820
First Presbyterian Church, Cortland, l00th anniversary publication, 1925 [pamphlet]
Ithaca photos: Belle Corodry Mansion, George W. Schuyler bldg.
History of the lumber industry of America
Watertown pamphlets: "150 Years of Watertown ... , "Bugles on the Border ... War of 1812 in Northern NY"
125th Anniversary of Christ Church [Protestant Episcopal, Oswego, NY ] (1822-1947) [pamphlet?]
History of York's Corners Methodist Episcopal Church, 1950 [pamphlet?1
"Charter and Laws Relating to the NY and Erie Railroad Co., General Railroad Law, & c.," 1849 [pamphlet]
Photo of President Wilson, King George V. and Queen Mary
"Opening Service of 1st Presbyterian Church; Evanston, Ill.; 1895 [pamphlet]
"Bird's Eye View, NY-Boston ... " "The Country Club of Ithaca," [pamphlet]; "Record Vote of All Congressmen on Eight Major National and International Issues" [pamphlet?]
Reed Rolled Thread Die Co ... a Historical Sketch, 1916- 1951

Reproductions of engraved images of George Frederick Handel, Johann Sebastian Bach, Mozart, G. E. Lessing, Schiller, Ist Sir Robert Peel, Rt. Hon. Sir Robert Peel, Warren Hastings, Sir John Franklin, David Livingstone
2 legal briefs: Louie A. Copeland v. The Delaware, Lackawanna, & Western Railroad Co., 1899
Map of Orange and Rockland Counties.

Enfield Glen newspaper clippings: "The Flume ... ," [photo]; "Lucifer Falls, ... ," [photo]; "Booklet in 1887 Painted Glowing Picture of Enfield," [pamphlet?]; "Sage Helped State to Obtain Park in Scenic Region" [pamphlet?]
Railroad miscellany: freight receipts, bills of lading, 1864, 1871
Butterfly story: " William Seaton and the Butterfly, …" [pamphlet]
Miscellaneous clippings, reprint, deed of land, patent, photograph, broadside 1770-1908
Little Valley (NY) Farm Bureau picnic, photographs, 1923
Mr. Barnard's discourse on ... Stephen Van Rensselaer, 1839 [pamphlet]
Nat. Bank of Commerce in NY, histories; 1917, 1921
International Paper Co., 1898-1949, [pamphlet?], annual report, 1952 [pamphlet]; The Battle of the Budworm ... [pamphlet?]
Directory of Lodges of the fraternal order of Free and Accepted Masons in the Cortland-Madison District, 1952 [pamphlet?]
Interborough Rapid Transit - The New York Subway…
Some Rations from "The Haver Sack," souvenir song book of Civil War songs, G.A.R. songs, patriotic songs
"Changes in Names of New York Towns," Myrte Rice Haynes and M. E. Mallenob [typescripts]
New York State Canners and Freezers Association pamphlet
Shephard Price digests from account book of Joel and Washington Shephard, 1805-1869; reports of Jelliffe, Wright & Co., produce commission merchants, 1893; and NY Tribune Farmer, 2/8/1906
Ithaca Journal-Extra, 7/27/1863: list of men drafted from Tompkins County
"The Land Patents of Otsego County" plus original map, 1852 [pamphlet?]
Lawyersville Dutch Reformed Church 150th anniversary publication, 1788-1938 [pamphlet?]
Foreign Car Club publications: "Autonaut," 1955-1956; "Horseless Age," 1904; "Stadtpark Cassel," [menu] I897; "Inwood Journal-Courier," 1941
Letter: Jonas Platt "to the People of Oneida County," [pamphlet]
Graphic - illustrated weekly - London, items re death of Garfield
Newspapers: Auburn Daily Bulletin, 1874; Auburn Daily Advertiser and Union 1865,1867; Auburn Citizen, 1919
Idaho Irrigation Company Papers: papers, 1 pamphlet
Misc.: hand made Valentine, c. 1900; The Garland, a Hand Book for Young Singers: scrapbooks of song sheets published in Philadelphia
History of the McLean Baptist Church, 1824-1903 [pamphlet]
Newspapers: Ulster County Gazette, 1800 [reprint]; Daily Citizen, 1863 (printed on wallpaper) [reprint]
Legal brief of L. H. Hammond
Misc. city of Ithaca items, and charter of city of Olean, 1872- 1922
Misc. items from Connecticut State Library
Items removed from family Bible re: births, marriages, deaths; school commissioner election leaflet
Centennial Wayme County Court House and Jail, 1854-1954 [pamphlet]
Premium list of the 80th annual Broome Co. Fair, 1954
Jamestown in Chautauqua County - a History, 1749-1952 [mimeo pages]
Trade card and clipping scrapbook, 1881-1938; valentines, 1903-1908
Transactions of the NYS Agricultural Society
DeRuyter items: Students Mirror, 1849; Directory of Methodist-Episcopal Church, 1893; Sunday School attendance record book, 1896
History of the Solon Baptist Church, 1954 [typescript)
Henderson Hydraulic Brakes for Railroad Cars, 1875; year book and annual reports of the Grand Lodge Home and Orphanage, Ithaca, NY for the year ending 6/30/1954 [2 pamphlets]
2 account books, 1824-1827; newspapers: Madison County , Herald, 1814; Madison County Eagle, 1841; Attica Atlas, 1870; Madison County Whig, 1846
Handy guide to NYC, 1902; Buffalo in 1836 and 1862; and Niagara Falls in Half-tone, 1901
"Ninth Cobblestone Tour Organized by the Cobblestone Society, ... 1969" [pamphlet/tour guide]
"Prescott - our first hundred and ten years," 1954 [pamphlet]
Prohibition County Committee letter, Elmira, NY; 1913
Misc.: dedication service bulletin, 1959; order of exercises, 1919; 150th anniversary celebration program, 1954
"Last will and testament of William Turpin," 1835 [pamphlet] frees his "colored people" and gives them land
"Honor Roll of Century Land in Yates County ... ," 1953 [pamphlet]
Directory of Varna Methodist Episcopal Church, 1899
Misc.: "Conservation of Coal by Electric Transmission," 1914; photos of Richard Dudgeon's steam car, 1939; paper for first Continental money to be printed; advt. re manufacturing in NY
"Free Hollow - The First One Hundred Years of Forest Home," [mimeo ms.]
Yates family photos and tin types
An Historical Sketch of the State Normal College at Albany, NY, 1844-1894
An Original Paper Upon Early Records in Cayuga County Clerk's Office, 1903 [pamphlet]
Premium lists for fairs and farm expositions, 1915-1952
Biographical Notes Relating to the Use and Experiences of Rush Wilson, 1945 [pamphlet]
History of the Town of Marion, 1795-1937 [pamphlet]
Minisink Valley Express: a history of the Port Jervis, Monticello & New York Railroad and its predecessors, 1956 [pamphlet]
Edward Steichan's photograph of James B. Conant
"Festal gathering of the Early Settlers and present Inhabitants of Virgil ... ," 1878 [centennial publication]
Cayuga County items: Aurora Masonic buildings, brief history of Aurora Inn [pamphlet]
Veterinarians of NYS biogs in pamphlet
Letters and certificates, miscellany re Belle King and Charles G. Meade
Milk price fixing thesis, John B. Johnson
Skaneateles and Catskills photographs and menu, 1883-1889
"A Story of Cayuga County, NY" [pamphlet] Buffalo books and pamphlets
"Dedication of the Bells, St. Paul's Cathedral, Buffalo, NY, 1924; [pamphlet]; "Historical Notes on the 20th Century Club of Buffalo" (pamphlet]
"Steam and Trolley Days on the Fonda, Johnstown and Gloversville Railroad," 1958 [pamphlet]
"History of the Town of Leon," 1958 (Cattaraugus Co.)
Newspapers: Liberator, 1860; Chicago Daily Tribune, 1881; Cleveland Leader, 1881
Report of Preservation of Historic Sites
Story of Cherry Valley, Henry Swinnerton, 1908
Chemung Canal Trust Co., 125th anniversary pamphlet, 1958
Congressman's letters on the speaker election in the 34th congress, 1956 [reprint/pamphlet]
Dryden High School pamphlets, Dryden Union School pamphlets, Freeville Public School [announcement]
Civilian Conservation Corps. (CCO publication: Hill Top News, 1934-1935
Elbert Hubbard papers: The Philistine, little Journeys, misc.
CCC newspapers: The Kanona Daze, 1936; The Kanonan, 1936-1937
Art work of Mohawk River and Valley, its cities and towns, 1902 [pamphlets]
1st Congregational Church, Perry Center, NY: 150th anniversary publication, 1964 [tr. to #4486]
Ithaca Fire Dept. Reports. ACCESSION FLD PULLED FOR ACCESSIONING ONLINE
Union Free School District No. ?, Ithaca, NY records, 1949- 1955
"The Story of the Cayugas, 1609-1809/' [pamphlets and research materials]
"Handbook of Facts for Referendum Workers in the Ithaca City School District," 1967 [pamphlet]
Misc. printed items: clippings, programs, pictures, pamphlets
Ithaca City Hospital: annual reports and bulletins, 1923-1927 [pamphlets]
SUNY at Cortland: student history essays, 1970
"Some Vital Records of Seneca County, NY ... ," 1945 [Xerox copy]
"The Sage of the Grange: A Life of Goldwin Smith," 1934 [thesis]
"History - A Channel of Communications, Jean W. Pauley, 1971 [pamphlet]
"The Spirit of '76," Carl Becker [pamphlet, reprint]; "The Black Minority in Early New York," David Kobrin, 1971 [pamphlet]
New Democratic Coalition of Tompkins Co. Records
Town of Venice, School District #23 records, 1837-1947; District #5,1903-1936 ACCESSION FLD PULLED FOR ACCESSIONING ONLINE
Cayuga Co. School District records ACCESSION FLD PULLED FOR ACCESSIONING ONLINE
International Committee of Co-ordination and Information for Aid to Republican Spain publications, 1936-1939
"Col. Johnston and the Sandfords," Ruth Johnston Griffin, 1976 [monograph]
Gerald R. Best, essay on motion-picture production in Ithaca, 1976 [ms.] [printed in Alumni News, 2 & 3 1977J
Political letters: Hon. William Tilghman from M. C. Inniss (Inness), 1801; Sen. Cornelius Cole to Mrs. Alicia H. Clark ("daughter"), 1921,1922
Publications from NYS academies, seminaries, etc.:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No # - Whitestown Index, 1877; Utica Academy, 1874; Central NY Conference Seminary, 1871-1872 [catalog]; Year Book, Temple Grove Seminary, 1896
